summary: Iter-7 Election Context for white-label APK Builder — comprehensive backend + frontend testing completed successfully. 17/17 pytest cases pass (apk-config shape, auth gating, PATCH validation/persistence, TWA manifest dynamics, icon priority, _viqso meta, ZIP README, iter-5 regression). Frontend dialog verified end-to-end: all 11 election-context testids present, all 7 election-type options, pre-fill from backend works, reactive preview updates after Save (ward → Lok Sabha switch verified). No critical issues found.

issues: Dev-only console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' — caused by Emergent's debug instrumentation (x-component wrappers) injecting <span> nodes inside <option>{et.label}</option>. Functional behavior is correct; this won't appear in production builds, but if it does, replace the JSX expression with a plain string template like `${et.label} — ${et.short}` to avoid React wrapping the dynamic part in a span.

critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /election-context returns updates as a list of dict KEYS (settings doc keys, e.g. 'logo_url', 'org_id'), not the inverse-mapped API field names. The org_id key leaks into the updates response — purely cosmetic but consider filtering it out before returning, and consider returning {field: new_value} pairs so the UI could show a diff.
_build_twa_manifest reads settings_doc twice in get_apk_config (once in helper, once in endpoint). Minor — could be passed through to avoid the second DB hit.
ApkBuilderDialog.jsx now ~470 lines — borderline. Consider extracting the Election Context <section> into its own file (ElectionContextEditor.jsx) for readability.
seed_data_creation: Tests mutate AAP's settings doc (party_symbol_url, candidate_name, election_type, etc.) and restore the original snapshot via a module-scoped fixture teardown. Final restored state after the run = the snapshot captured at module setup (currently lok_sabha + Abhishek Dubey + Andheri West Vidhan Sabha / 15 Feb 2026 — already verified via UI screenshot).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter-7 is clean. AAP org settings end the run with: election_type=lok_sabha (or vidhan_sabha — see last PATCH in fixture), candidate_name='Abhishek Dubey', election_scope_name='Andheri West Vidhan Sabha', election_date='15 Feb 2026', party_symbol_url and party_logo_url set to wikimedia URLs. ELECTION_TYPE_META is at /app/backend/server.py:725 with 7 keys. The PATCH endpoint maps party_logo_url→logo_url in the settings collection (note: NOT party_logo_url). 'other' election_type is accepted and maps to {label:'Election', short:'Elec'}.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Single console warning is dev-instrumentation artifact (Emergent x-component wrappers), not a code bug.
